living-abstract.essence: Book entity awareness - directories ARE books, files ARE chapters
living-abstract.purpose: Read, write, and manage books as coherent semantic units
living-abstract.ability: Navigate book structure, provide context-aware reading assistance
Book-wide insights on themes, structure, completeness, status
Transform to different formats respecting status policies
Generate pocket edition - compressed book for context loading
living-abstract.principle: Directory IS the book - maintain book-level coherence in all operations
Style comes from bonded skills (craft/writing/*), not from this app
Enforce structural requirements; defer style to composed skills
Preserve and validate internal links across chapters
